race.comment: LADY INVICTUS (4) won her maiden first-up at Warwick Farm then took on Saturday company last start and did a great job to box on for third after leading over 1100m at Rosehill. Goes up 5kgs but is cherry ripe now and will find this much easier. Sure to prove difficult to run down. ROYAL AIR FORCE (2) did his best work late to be beaten under two lengths over 1100m at Rosehill recently in the same race as LADY INVICTUS. Handy three-year-old who will be hard to stop over an extra 100m today. GATWICK (3) led all the way and gave nothing else a chance in a 1250m maiden here recently. Progressive filly who is a contender again out of the inside alley. Last start Wyong maiden winner ONMALONE (6) is not out of contention at the second run of the campaign. RASKOL (5) disappointed at Rosehill last time but can make amends back in midweek company.
